name: Carryover of General Business and Foreign Tax Credits

eligibility.description: Corporations with unused credits under Sections 39, 53, or 904(c) at the time of an ownership change.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows the carryover and use of unused general business credits, minimum tax credits, and foreign tax credits following an ownership change, subject to Section 382 principles.
